title: My Road to Become a CMSE
description: My experience preparing for the CMSE certification by TÜV NORD.
content:
# My Road to Becoming a CMSE®

When I was in college, I worked as a **machine safety integrator**, facing real‑world challenges that no textbook fully prepares you for. Risk assessments, safety circuits, audits — I lived all of it on the shop floor.

That’s why I pursued the **CMSE® – Certified Machinery Safety Expert (TÜV NORD)** certification.

And let me tell you: it’s not just a title.  
It’s a confirmation that you truly understand machinery safety at a deep, professional level.
